scripts.build: pnpm run codegen && turbo run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n convex,web,extension -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm run convex:dev" "pnpm --filter @bookmark-sync/web dev" "pnpm --filter @bookmark-sync/extension dev"
scripts.format: biome check --write --unsafe apps/web/app apps/web/components apps/web/lib apps/web/proxy.ts apps/web/next.config.ts apps/web/package.json apps/web/tsconfig.json apps/extension/src apps/extension/package.json apps/extension/tsconfig.json apps/extension/vite.config.ts apps/extension/postcss.config.js apps/extension/popup.html convex scripts packages/convex packages/ui packages/utils packages/config/package.json packages/config/tsconfig.base.json package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json convex.json .env.example .gitignore README.md biome.json
